# Provenance — skills-catalog (reference, not skills)

- **Source:** https://github.com/obviousworks/Claude-AI-skills-collection-2026
- **Pinned commit:** `434a450c3f21285e6c7e1c814e663c66a22b96e7`
- **Vendored on:** 2026-06-25

`README.md` is a **curated catalog** (~100 community + official Claude skills
with links by category) — it contains **no installable skills**, just a
browse-list. Use it as a discovery index when looking for a skill to vendor;
then clone that skill's own repo, security-review it, and vendor it under
`vendor/` following the active/dormant model. License terms belong to each
linked repo individually.
